response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.), and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse language experience
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems across multiple domains
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: No C or embedded firmware development experience as required
No knowledge or experience with LAN-switch security protocols or Linux kernel analysis
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: Lack of Network Security Tech Exposure
